Items.Title: Mexico vs England - World Cup LIVE: 10-man Three Lions sweating as hosts get back to 3-2 with Harry Kane giving away a penalty - just after scoring and following Jude Bellingham double
Items.Description: Follow Daily Mail Sport's live coverage of the latest updates as Mexico take on England in the last 16 of the World Cup in Mexico City.

Items.Title: Bellingham heads England into the lead against Mexico
Items.Description: Jude Bellingham gives England the lead over Mexico with a header at the back post during their last 16 at the Mexico City Stadium.
